mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", s.stage_name AS "stageName" FROM inspection a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN project_stage s ON s.id = a.stage_id
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.projectName}, '%') AND p.name LIKE '%' || #{params.projectName} || '%'
AND a.status = #{params.status} AND a.plan_inspection_time >= #{params.startDate} AND a.plan_inspection_time <= #{params.endDate}
ORDER BY a.plan_inspection_time DESC, a.id DESC

SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", s.stage_name AS "stageName" FROM inspection a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN project_stage s ON s.id = a.stage_id WHERE a.id = #{id}
